MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Ii
Off Calendar Jun-10-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Jane Mackie, Esq. (In-person) Elana Jacobs, Esq. 510-433-1000 Burritt Scott and Jacobs LLP() for Plaintiff.
Adrienne De Monet, Esq. 415-554-3928 Office of the City Attorney for Defendant CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. (In-person)
Terry Finck, Esq. 415-421-3100 GKHS for Defendant Hawkins.
Court reporter: Angela Pourtabib, CSR #13714, 415-601-7054, Apourtabib@gmail.com (In-person)

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.

Ms. De Monet contests and presents arguments; mutliple MSAs, because of sex, severe or pervasive, evidentiary objections & declarations.
Mr. Finck contests and resents arguments on joinder; agrees with 2nd and 3rd element, improper state of mind.
Court comments and poses questions; Joinder of Mr. Finck was rejected.
Ms. Mackie responds to arguments from counsel; present to a jury, observations relevant, disputed facts, evidence, side hug, sex objective standar, complaints, deposition/testimony.
Ms. De Monet and Mr. Finck present a brief rebuttal.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Motion for Summary Adjudication.

Taken Under Submission.

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

A proposed order is submitted for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Angela Pourtabib, CSR #13714, 415-601-7054, Apourtabib@gmail.com, Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Jun-04-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Jane Mackie, Esq. 510-433-1000 Winer Burritt Scott and Jacobs LLP for Plaintiff.
Adrienne Demonet, Esq. 424-302-6996 Office of the City Attorney for Defendant SF Recreation and Parks. (In-person)
Terry Finck, Esq. 415-421-3100 Gordon Creed Kelley Holl & Sugerman LLP for Defendant Hawkins.
Court reporter: Jane Hong, CSR #11975, 909-831-8819, csrjane@hotmail.com

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

The Court inquires why Defense filed 3 motions for summary adjudication and comments; cites CCP 437(c), legislature not clear, due process concerns, court's resources.
Ms. Demonet responds; matter of law, uniqueness, criminal, health concerns.

ARGUED.

Ms. Demonet contests and presents arguments; the issue is a question of law and not for the jury, whether there is admissible evidence, sham declaration, conjecture, cite 647.6, context of relationship, ambiguity.
Ms. Mackie responds to Ms. Demonet's arguments; question of law, testimony, repeated conduct, enter the tentative ruling.
Ms. Demonet's brief rebuttal.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

City and County of San Francisco's Motion for Summary Adjudication is Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Jane Hong, CSR #11975, 909-831-8819, csrjane@hotmail.com, Reported. (302/JMQ)
